prompt: In this spot, choose the best action from the cues.
why_v1: Choose the action that matches your track plan and current pressure.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits the cue set, so the line avoids paying off when the pressure story is working against you.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Folding works better because tournament pressure makes survival worth more than chasing a hand that cannot continue profitably.
